name: Shells Spawned by Web Servers
notes:
This rule detects web servers that spawn shell processes which could be the result of a successfully placed web shell or another attack.

Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Thomas Patzke, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Zach Stanford @svch0st, Tim Shelton, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Shells Spawned by Web Servers
SIGMA Description: Detects web servers that spawn shell processes which could be the result of a successfully placed web shell or another attack


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches "Parent Process Full Full Name" MATCHES '(w3wp|php|php-cgi|nginx|httpd|caddy|ws_TomcatService|tomcat|UMWorkerProcess|java|javaw)\.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Windows Shell Processes', "Process Full Full Name") AQL filter query

when the event matches ("Command" LIKE '%Windows\system32\cmd.exe /c C:\ManageEngine\ADManager "Plus\ES\bin\elasticsearch.bat -Enode.name=RMP-NODE1 -pelasticsearch-pid.txt' OR ("Command" LIKE '%sc query%' AND "Command" LIKE '%ADManager Plus%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Shells Spawned by Web Servers on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches "Parent Process Full Full Name" MATCHES '(w3wp|php|php-cgi|nginx|httpd|caddy|ws_TomcatService|tomcat|UMWorkerProcess|java|javaw)\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Windows Shell Processes', "Process Full Full Name") AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches ("Command" LIKE '%Windows\system32\cmd.exe /c C:\ManageEngine\ADManager "Plus\ES\bin\elasticsearch.bat -Enode.name=RMP-NODE1 -pelasticsearch-pid.txt' OR ("Command" LIKE '%sc query%' AND "Command" LIKE '%ADManager Plus%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Shells Spawned by Web Servers
Event description: Detects web servers that spawn shell processes which could be the result of a successfully placed web shell or another attack
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
